name: COSTAR GROUP, INC.
summary: PART I In this Report, the words we, our, us, CoStar Group, or the Company refer to CoStar Group, Inc. and its direct and indirect wholly-owned subsidiaries. This Report also refers to our websites, but information contained on those sites is not part of this Report. Overview CoStar Group is a leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, analytics, and 3D digital twin technology in the property markets.
